subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast rejoiced in the glad-tidings of God, and hast sought the downpour from the clouds of His mercy, and hast been illumined by the light that hath shone forth from the dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استبشر ببشارات الله و استمطر من سحاب رحمه الله و استضاء من نور انتشر من صبح
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @the concourse on high, @being a source of light; guidance
